beats.what: Pedestrians walk across the busy Shibuya crossing intersection.
Vehicles and buses navigate through the city streets and intersections.
People walk along the sidewalks near large buildings and advertisements.

formal.text: Pedestrians traverse the Shibuya crossing intersection.
Vehicles navigate the urban street network.
Pedestrians continue movement along the sidewalk.

sarcastic.text: Ah, the peaceful solitude of a thousand strangers.
Moving vehicles. Truly the pinnacle of urban Zen.
Another riveting stroll past a very large billboard.

humorous_tech.text: Massive race condition occurring at the Shibuya intersection.
Traffic routing logic is failing under heavy load.
Still waiting for the thread to sync.

humorous_non_tech.text: It is like a giant game of human Tetris.
Now the big metal boxes are playing too.
Even the sidewalks are full of people playing Tetris.
